title: Part 7 – Passage unique : règlement intérieur
instructions: Lisez le règlement, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
Employee Code of Conduct — Key Points

1. Punctuality: Employees are expected to arrive on time for all scheduled shifts and meetings. Repeated lateness without prior notice may result in a formal warning.

2. Dress code: Business casual attire is required from Monday to Thursday. On Fridays, employees may wear smart casual clothing.

3. Use of personal devices: Personal mobile phones should be kept on silent during working hours and should not be used for personal calls at the workstation. Phones may be used during breaks in designated areas.

4. Confidentiality: Employees must not share any client information, internal data, or company strategies with unauthorized individuals, including on social media.

5. Conflict of interest: Any outside employment or business activity that may conflict with company interests must be declared in writing to the HR department.

questions.explanation: Le document s'intitule "Employee Code of Conduct".

questions.prompt: On which day can employees wear smart casual clothing?
questions.explanation: "On Fridays, employees may wear smart casual clothing".

questions.prompt: Where may employees use their personal phones?
choices: At their workstation at any time
questions.explanation: "Phones may be used during breaks in designated areas".

questions.prompt: What must employees do if they have outside business activity?
choices: Declare it in writing to HR
Get approval from their manager only
Do nothing if it does not affect work
questions.explanation: "must be declared in writing to the HR department".
